title: ast: make design available to process_module()
body: Per the March 15 meeting, we may be able to address a few existing issues with the elaboration of port connections by making the module information available during `simplify()`. This is a tiny stepping stone in that direction which provides access to the design at the call site of the module `simplify()` entrypoint. While I'd be happy to defer changes like this until the overall implementation is finished, I'd hoping to reduce noise in that final change set as much as possible.
